tasks.label: YAML validieren
tasks.command:
for f in /workspaces/display_drehwurm/*.yaml; do python3 -c "
import yaml, sys
class L(yaml.SafeLoader): pass
yaml.add_multi_constructor('', lambda l,t,n: None, Loader=L)
yaml.load(open('$f'), L)
" 2>&1 && echo "✓ $(basename $f)" || echo "✗ FEHLER: $(basename $f)"; done
